title: Infinite Ancient Citys
description: Your minecraft world with an absurd amount of Ancient Citys!
body:
# Ancient cities infinite in your world

This datapack transforms your Minecraft world by allowing ancient cities to appear in almost every biome and disproportionately, creating an intense and challenging exploration experience.

**Key features:**

* Massively increases the frequency of appearance of ancient cities, filling the world with these structures.
* Expands the generation of ancient cities to a wide range of biomes, including lush caves, cherry forests, deserts, and more.
* Adjusts the starting height of generation to make cities appear higher.
* Removes mobs spawn inside old cities.
* Adjusts city size.

**Installation instructions:**

1.  **Main option:**
    * Download the .zip file of the datapack from here.
    * When creating a new world in Minecraft, select the "Datapacks" option and add the downloaded .zip file.
2.  **Alternative option:**
    * Download the .zip file of the datapack from here.
    * Open your Minecraft world folder.
    * Copy the .zip file inside the “datapacks” folder.
    * In the game, use the `/reload` command to activate the datapack.
